citation.source_quote: We delivered a strong first quarter, with revenue of $312 million, up 34% year over year
We don't typically guide that far out and prefer not to break out customer-specific economics

forward_statements.statement_text: Expect mid-to-high twenties revenue growth for fiscal 2026, gross margin 62-64%.

citation.source_quote: we expect mid-to-high twenties revenue growth for fiscal 2026
